rows.label: qev056104_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I see... You came to save us.
I apologize for the trouble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056104_MSG0003
rows.name:
As I thought, we were wrong... The
voice of the Ovah was right...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056104_MSG0004
rows.name:
We should never... have touched...
that thing deep inside...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056104_MSG0005
rows.name:
...At the very least, please...
save... Run'otonam...[ST:wait ]
